raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad isneffe Mohsus wiffus
fchohs Kohkus no ta KUNGA
Breekschâ/ pee wiffeem Israëta
Behrneem/ un tee redseja to/ un
xehme ifweens jawu Kohku.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija tas KUNgs
us Mohsu: Nets to Aärona Koh-
fu atpakkat preefsch to Leezibu/
ka tas paglabbachts tohp/ par
weenu Sihmi preefsch teem pahr-
galwigeem Behrneem/ ta buhs
tew tahs Kurnefchanas prett
manni apkluffinaht/ ka teem ne
irr jamirst.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Mohsus darrija ta/
ittin ka tas KUNGS tam bija
pawehlejis/ ta darrija wiꞥſch.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad runnaja tee Israëta
Behrni us Mohsu: Rangi/ mehs
apmirstam/ mehs eetam bohjâ/
mehs wiꞥſch eetam poſtâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ikkatrê/ tas pee-eedams
pee ta KUNGA Dshwokli pee-
eet/ tain jamirst/ buhs tad muuns
wiffeem apmirt/ un bohjâ eet?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "tawa Tehwa Naimnam ar tew-
buhs tahs fwehtas Weetas
Noseegumu nest/ un Tew/ un ta-
weem Dehleem buhs ta Preeste-
ra-Annata Noseegumu nest.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un juuns buhs juhfus Brah-
fus/ to Lewja Zilti/ tawu Teh-
wa Zilti/ lihds ar tew peewest/ ka-
tee tew peelikti tohp/ un ten-
kafpo/ bet tew/ un taweem Brah-
teem ar tew/ buhs preefsch tahe
Leezibas Telts buht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Unteem buhs fargaht/ fas-
tew pawehlehts irr/ un tahs farga-
gajamas Leetas eekſch wiffas
Telts/ tomehr pee tahs fwehtas
Weetas Ribkeem/ un pee ta Al-
tara teem ne buhs pee-eet/ ka-
winni nemirst/ ir winni/ ir juhs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet teem buhs tew peelik-
teem tapt/ un to Sargafchanu-
tahs fwehtas Weetas/Sa-eefcha-
nas Telti turreht/ wiffads
Telts Darbôs/ un neweenaim
Sweschineekam buhs pee jums
pee-eet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jums tad nu tahs fweh-
tas Weetas fargajamas Leetas
jasarga/ un ta Altara fargajamu
Darbu/ ka newairs Bahrsiba ef-
foti pahr teem Israëta Behr-
neem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo Es/rangi/es etmu juh-
fus Brahkus tohs Lewitus neh-
mis no teem Israëta Behrneem/
tee irr jums par Dahwanu tam
KUNGAM dohti/ ka teem ja-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
